# agents-standard

> Specification for the AGENTS.md hierarchical configuration standard.
> One file convention, three scopes, all agents.

## Version

1.1.0

## Resolution Order

1. `~/.agents/AGENTS.md` — Global user rules (loaded first)
2. `.agents/AGENTS.md` at repo root — Project rules (committed)
3. `.agents/AGENTS.md` in cwd — Folder-specific rules

Most specific scope wins (folder > project > global). Each layer extends, not replaces.

## Agent Coverage

30 agents tracked with verified config file paths, MCP config locations, and docs URLs.
Full structured data: https://agentsstandard.com/agents.json

## Agents with Native AGENTS.md Support

- Pi — reads ~/.agents/AGENTS.md and .agents/AGENTS.md
- Kilo Code — reads AGENTS.md at project root
- OpenCode — reads AGENTS.md at project root
- Deep Agents (dcode) — reads .deepagents/AGENTS.md and AGENTS.md
- Zed — reads AGENTS.md at project root

All other agents can symlink ~/.agents/AGENTS.md into their config location.

## Standard Directory Layout

```
~/.agents/
├── AGENTS.md              ← Behavior rules (this standard)
├── mcp-settings.json      ← MCP server configs (universal, planned)
└── skills/                ← Agent Skills
    └── **/SKILL.md
```

## Format

Plain Markdown. No YAML frontmatter. No schema.

## Links

- Website: https://agentsstandard.com
- Spec repo: https://github.com/nbiish/agents-standard
- Site repo: https://github.com/nbiish/agentsstandard-dot-com
- Structured data: https://agentsstandard.com/agents.json
- Setup script: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nbiish/agents-standard/main/setup.sh
